sections.content: Cross Country Ski Trail Conditions as of March 6, 2026 –
Due to trail conditions Bucks Run will be closed for the season.  Thank you for a great one!

Nubs Nob (Harbor Springs).conditions: The morning sweet spot for the last 3 days has been awesome . The groomers are taking full advantage of the 20 inch hardpack base .

Huron Meadows Metropark (Brighton).conditions: Excellent again. Fresh groom/till this AM held up well…fast and hard. Probably another day left tomorrow since it will freeze again tonight.

nubsNob.xcTrails: Trails are in good condition with a track set. We will groom the trails the next time they freeze.
nubsNob.nightSkiing: Night Skiing is Tuesday thru Saturday from 5:30 to 9:00 p.m. Night skiing ends on March 14.
nubsNob.comments: The ski surface this morning is a loose coarse granular snow. It looks like spring skiing is in store for the day. The snow will become increasingly loose and wet during the day as the temperature is forecast to hit 50 degrees. Rain is predicted to move in late this afternoon and stick around through the night. Pintail Peak Lodge is open with food service and an espresso bar. The lifts will spin from 9:00 a.m. to 9:00 p.m. with an hour break at 4:30. Make it a great spring ski day at Nub's Nob.
